data.title: KBRA Releases Research – States Face a Heavy Lift From OBBBA’s Medicaid Rules
data.description: KBRA, a credit rating agency, has recently published research on the effects of the One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA) on states' Medicaid programs. The OBBBA, enacted in July 2025, introduces significant alterations to Medicaid funding for states. These changes include reductions in federal funding, restrictions on how states can generate their portion of funds, and the introduction of new administrative expenses. KBRA has been examining the potential credit consequences of the evolving dynamics resulting from the OBBBA through various reports since its implementation.

data.title: Bitcoin's value surged post Iran ceasefire. The new 'AfterDark' ETF, avoiding US trading hours, could have captured the growth.
data.description: Investors can now tap into an ETF crafted to skirt the U.S. trading session, providing exposure to Bitcoin during Wall Street's downtime.

data.title: Iran Demands Bitcoin Payments At Hormuz As Trump Says Strait Must Open 'Immediately And Completely'
data.description: During a two-week ceasefire period, Iran is set to demand shipping companies to pay tolls in Bitcoin for oil tankers traversing the Strait of Hormuz. This move directly contradicts President Trump's call for the complete and immediate opening of the waterway. Iran's Oil, Gas and Petrochemical Products Exporters' Union spokesperson, Hamid Hosseini, stated that the country aims to collect toll fees from each passing tanker for monitoring purposes and to prevent weapon transfers during the ceasefire. The toll is set at $1 per barrel of oil. Tankers are required to email authorities about their cargo, and Iran will then notify them of the toll in digital currencies.

data.title: Convocation of the General Ordinary Shareholders Meeting of SUTNTIB AB “Tewox”
data.description: In Vilnius, Lithuania, on April 8, 2026, the Management Company LORDS LB ASSET MANAGEMENT, UAB has announced the convocation of the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders for the closed-end real estate investment company AB "Tewox" (company code 305733600). The meeting will take place on April 29, 2026, at 13:00 p.m. at the company's registered office located at Jogailos st. 4, 01116 Vilnius, Lithuania.

data.title: New memoir by CZ reignites feud with OKX's Star Xu over contract forgery and Huobi arrest, with Xu accusing him of lying.
data.description: The release of CZ's latest memoir has sparked a renewed clash with OKX founder Star Xu. Xu openly accused the Binance founder of dishonesty in statements shared on social media platform X, reigniting their ongoing feud. This feud, encompassing public accusations and disputes, has been a prominent feature in the cryptocurrency community, drawing the attention of numerous followers. The memoir's content has led to a resurgence in tensions between the two key figures, garnering significant interest and discussion within the industry.

data.title: Tanium Named a Top 50™ Cybersecurity Technology Provider by Everest Group
data.description: Tanium, based in Emeryville, California, has been recognized by Everest Group in their first Cybersecurity Top 50™ list. This prestigious ranking identifies the top cybersecurity technology providers worldwide, with Tanium being acknowledged for its significant impact on the industry. Tanium's Autonomous IT Platform, powered by AI and real-time intelligence, is revolutionizing endpoint management and security for organizations. This accolade showcases Tanium's leadership and influence, solidifying its position in the global security sector.

data.title: Pearl Introduces Ambient Voice AI Suite for Dentistry
data.description: In Los Angeles, a new technology known as Pearl Voice is revolutionizing the way doctor-patient conversations are documented. By utilizing Artificial Intelligence, Pearl Voice transforms these conversations into organized clinical notes and prepares them for chart documentation. This innovative tool is changing the game in healthcare, streamlining the process and improving efficiency for medical professionals.

data.title: ACORD Carrier M&A study finds 68% of global carrier transactions create organizational value
data.description: A recent analysis of worldwide carrier transactions completed between July 2023 and December 2025 unveiled significant changes in the factors influencing deals. The data was made public by ACORD on April 8, 2026, who is recognized as the organization establishing standards for the international insurance sector.
